rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CAROL SALOMON
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Assignment Of Interests In Estate And Authorizing Distribution Directly To Finders International
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/30/25. Examiner's Notes sent to attorney with the following issues: 1) The following individuals have not been given notice: a. The issue of Rodrigo Solomon Isla (only 1 of the 9 individuals have been given notice) 2) Petitioner requests approval of assignment from Ronald Batan, but no request for distribution to Ronald Batan was made in the petition for final distribution. In addition, no agreement by Ronald Batan has been filed. Petitioner alleges that Ronald Batan died on 2/2/20 without spouse or issue. Further, an agreement with Ronald Batan still has not been filed. Thus, the request to approve assignment with Ronald Batan should be removed. 3) The alleged issue of Rodrigo Solomon are not requested to be beneficiaries of the estate (distribution is requested to be made to the County Treasurer). Petitioner states that a small estate affidavit has been filed. However: 1) the petition for final distribution requests distribution to the County Treasurer; 2) the original 13100 Affidavit must be filed (not e-filed); 3) the 13100 affidavit that was filed was not for Rodrigo Solomon (it was for Marcela Aononan). 4) Petitioner requests that their agreement with Fatima Ambrocio be approved; however, Petitioner states that she has not provided a copy of her birth certificate. Moreover, the petition for final distribution does not request distribution to her. The request to approve the assignment cannot be approved if the petition for final distribution does not even request distribution to her. The request should be removed. 5) A revised proposed order must be submitted with any necessary changes.

For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
